## 10. Notes File Template

Copy this exactly into your new file and fill in every section:

````markdown
# Week X — Topic Title Here

**Contributed by:** Your Full Name  
**Student ID:** SWE/XXXX/XXXX  
**Date:** Month Year  
**Course:** SDA202

---

## Overview

Write a short introduction to the topic (2–3 sentences).

---

## Key Concepts

### Concept 1 — Name of Concept

Explanation of the concept in your own words...

### Concept 2 — Name of Concept

Explanation of the concept in your own words...

---

## Detailed Notes

Write your detailed notes here. Use headings, bullet points,
and tables to organise information clearly.

If you want to give foot notes[^1]

---

## Code Examples

### Example 1 — Description

```python
# Your code here
def example():
    pass
```

### Example 2 — Description

```python
# Another example
```

---

## Summary

- Key point 1
- Key point 2
- Key point 3

---

## References

- Lecture slides — Week X
- [Source Name](https://url.com)
- Textbook: Title, Author, Page XX

[^1] : footnote
````
